name: link-health
description: Example declarative extension that exposes unresolved wikilink metadata and a local link-health view without running code.

permissions.reason: Compares wikilinks with the local note index already built by Forge.

contributes.label: Unresolved link metadata
contributes.description: Reports unresolved wikilinks and broken-link counts from the local vault index.

contributes.label: Link health
contributes.description: Declares a local link-health sidebar widget backed by Forge-owned vault metadata.
